title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAMES OF CERTAIN BARRIOS IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SARA, PROVINCE OF ILOILO.

chunks.text:
H. No. 5548 / 53 OG No. 16, 5151 (August 31, 1957)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1733, June 21, 1957 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAMES OF CERTAIN BARRIOS IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SARA, PROVINCE OF ILOILO.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:
